surface.name: Together Quickstart via cURL chat completions (prepaid credits)
surface.selection_basis: Together's Quickstart documents a cURL POST to https://api.together.ai/v1/chat/completions with Authorization: Bearer $TOGETHER_API_KEY. The billing credits guide states Together does not offer a free trial, requires a minimum $5 credit purchase, is fully prepaid, and needs a positive credit balance to use the platform. An SDK install is not required for the first authenticated chat-completions call.

alternatives_considered.name: together Python SDK
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Optional client library; the same quickstart documents an equivalent cURL request.

alternatives_considered.name: OpenAI-compatible client libraries
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Convenience wrappers for the same HTTP endpoint.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a Together account, add a payment method, purchase at least $5 of prepaid credits, obtain an API key, and complete a chat-completions request over HTTPS.
assumed_prior_state: No Together account, payment method, credits, API key, or prior request is assumed.
A terminal with cURL is available; no language SDK is assumed.

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: An authenticated cURL POST to https://api.together.ai/v1/chat/completions returns chat-completion model output.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: The HTTP response body includes assistant message content for the requested prompt.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: The Quickstart documents register, create an API key, export TOGETHER_API_KEY, and a cURL POST to /v1/chat/completions. Billing credits docs require a minimum $5 prepaid purchase with no free trial.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: The first meaningful LLM success is a successful authenticated chat-completions response. cURL is documented on the quickstart, so pip install together is optional. Prepaid credits and a payment method are required before platform usage because Together documents no free trial and a minimum $5 credit purchase.

prerequisites.requirement: A Together account created through the documented Google or GitHub signup route, with an organization and Default Project.
A supported payment method as the default, plus at least $5 of prepaid credits and a positive usable balance. Together documents no free trial and fully prepaid access.
A project API key created in the Default Project, copied immediately, and exported as TOGETHER_API_KEY.
A terminal with cURL (or any HTTP client). No language SDK is required.

primary_path.action: Open the Together Quickstart and follow Register for an account.
Choose Google or GitHub and complete that provider's OAuth sign-in.
details: Google and GitHub are peer OAuth signup providers.
primary_path.success_signal: An organization with a Default Project is available.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Follow the provider or Together account recovery path.

primary_path.action: Confirm the account organization and included Default Project.
primary_path.output: Default Project ready for API keys and billing
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Create or select a project if none is present.

primary_path.action: Create a named project API key, copy it immediately, and store it securely.
details: Open the Default Project API keys settings, select Create API Key, optionally set expiration, and create the key.
The key value is shown once.
primary_path.success_signal: The key value is saved locally.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: If the value is lost, create a new key.

primary_path.output: Shell environment ready for authenticated HTTP
primary_path.success_signal: TOGETHER_API_KEY is set in the current shell.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Shell persistence depends on the OS.

primary_path.action: Add a supported payment method and purchase at least $5 of prepaid credits.
details: Open Billing settings, manage payment methods, add a supported card, and make it the default.
Purchase at least $5 through Add Credits and wait for the balance to update.
Together documents no free trial and fully prepaid access; a positive credit balance is required to use the platform.
A credit purchase can remain pending for up to 15 minutes before the balance updates.
primary_path.success_signal: Billing shows a usable credit balance of at least the purchased amount.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Payment verification delays or a $0 balance leave API requests unable to succeed.

primary_path.action: POST a chat-completions request with cURL to https://api.together.ai/v1/chat/completions.
details: Include Authorization: Bearer $TOGETHER_API_KEY and Content-Type: application/json.
Send a JSON body with model and messages as shown in the quickstart cURL example.
primary_path.success_signal: The API returns a successful JSON body containing assistant message content.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Missing key, insufficient credits, or invalid JSON produce API errors.

primary_path.action: Confirm the chat-completions JSON includes assistant message content.
primary_path.success_signal: Assistant content is present in the successful response.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: An error body means the first call did not succeed.

branches.condition: The developer chooses GitHub instead of Google for OAuth signup.
branches.path: Complete GitHub OAuth; the rest of the prepaid + cURL path is unchanged.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Peer identity provider; no change to the API boundary.

branches.condition: The developer prefers the together Python SDK instead of cURL.
branches.path: Run pip install together and execute the published Python snippet; the same API key and credit balance are still required.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Adds optional package installation without changing the authenticated chat-completions boundary.

friction_gates.description: Google and GitHub are peer OAuth signup providers.
The project key is displayed only once and must be saved immediately.
A supported payment method is required; bank or provider verification can delay readiness.
There is no free trial; at least $5 of prepaid credits and a positive balance are required before API usage.
A credit purchase can remain pending for up to 15 minutes before the balance updates.

sources.title: Payment methods and invoices
evidence_supported: Add and default a payment method

sources.title: Billing troubleshooting
evidence_supported: Up to 15 minute credit balance update wait

uncertainties.question: Exact card brands and regional payment-method exclusions for the default payment method.
uncertainties.impact: Could block credit purchase for some payment instruments.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: Payment-methods docs list supported methods at a high level without a exhaustive regional matrix on the researched pages.
